name: save-flow-intent
note: Issue #265 (operator UAT 2026-07-17), all three save-flow items in one pass. A: a FRESH progression save (no song structure touched) asks intent first - 'Save this progression, or build it into a song?'. B: the name row defaults to 'Original progression' (asset-type-aware, not 'Original track'). C: post-save shows the named-asset banner with a one-tap next step (Open Setlist when the opt-in was checked); tapping it lands on the Setlist with the saved item on top. Written red-first against main (no intent row, 'Original track' default, bare 'Saved to your Library' toast).

steps.label: #265-A: the intent row asks first - message + 'Save progression' (primary) + 'Build a song with it'
steps.js: (function(){var row=document.querySelector('.composeRow');if(!row||row.hidden)return false;var t=row.textContent;return t.indexOf('Save this progression, or build it into a song?')>=0 && t.indexOf('Save progression')>=0 && t.indexOf('Build a song with it')>=0;})()

steps.label: #265-B: the default name is asset-type-aware - 'Original progression', not 'Original track'
#265-C: the post-save banner names the saved asset and offers the Setlist as the one-tap next step
steps.js: (function(){var b=document.querySelector('.saveDone');if(!b||b.hidden)return false;var t=b.textContent;return t.indexOf('Saved Original progression')>=0 && t.indexOf('Open Setlist')>=0;})()

steps.label: #265-C: the next-step tap lands on the Setlist with the saved progression on top
